narrative:
Preble County has 27,680 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.7 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.5% of registrants.
